reviews.comment:
Muy lindo y buen lugar, dificultad distribucion d combustibl (carga d las cisternas). 1 hora d espera con 34° d calor

(Translated by Google)
Very nice and good place, but fuel distribution (filling the tanks) was difficult. We waited an hour in 34°C heat.

reviews.comment:
La estación es emblemática y la vista impagable.
Ahora, en media temporada siguen teniendo una sola persona para atender y cobrar y los que tienen la concesión del bar son unos ladrones.

(Translated by Google)
The station is iconic and the view is priceless.
Now, even mid-season, they still only have one person to serve and collect payment, and those who run the bar are thieves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNcl95WmdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación sobre la ruta, frente al lago, nafta super y ultra, gasoil normal y especial, te cargan los puntos en la serviclub de ypf y tenes los descuentos del acá, 5% en combustibles y 10% en lubricantes, la atención es buena y la vista hermosa, tiene baños

(Translated by Google)
Gas station on the highway, facing the lake, super and ultra gasoline, regular and special diesel, they load your YPF Serviclub points and you get discounts here, 5% on fuels and 10% on lubricants, the service is good and the view is beautiful, it has restrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNOV9iS3pRRRAB
